title: Papyrus #0018: Greek-Egyptian Petition
description: A Greek papyrus from Hellenistic/Roman Egypt — petition document.
introduction: A Greek papyrus from Hellenistic/Roman Egypt — petition document.

translation.text: From the papyrus collections of Greco-Roman Egypt: a petition document preserved in the dry sands. These papyri document daily life in ways no monumental inscription can.
